import React, { useState } from "react"; import "../styles/HomePage.css"; // Import CSS for styling function HomePage() { const [cart, setCart] = useState([]); // Sample products data const featuredProducts = [ { id: 1, name: "Product A", price: 10.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/250" }, { id: 2, name: "Product B", price: 19.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/250" }, { id: 3, name: "Product C", price: 14.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/250" }, { id: 4, name: "Product D", price: 24.99, image: "https://via.placeholder.com/250" }, ]; // Add to cart function const addToCart = (product) => { setCart([...cart, product]); alert(`${product.name} added to cart!`); }; return (
